title: SoFi posts record Q1 2026 revenue, profit and raises detailed 2026 outlook
text: SoFi Technologies posted record Q1 2026 revenue and profit while raising its detailed 2026 outlook. Record GAAP net revenue of $1.1 billion increased 43% relative to the prior-year period's $771.8 million, with record adjusted net revenue of $1.1 billion growing 41% from $770.7 million. Net income was $167 million at a 15% margin, up 2.3 times year-over-year, with earnings per share of $0.12. The company raised detailed guidance for 2026, projecting adjusted net revenue of $4.655 billion (30% growth) and adjusted EBITDA near $1.6 billion (30% margin). Management expects at least 30% member growth in 2026, with the company adding 1.1 million members in Q1 to reach 14.7 million total. Total loan originations reached a record $12.2 billion, driven by personal loans ($8.3B, up 51%), student loans ($2.6B, up 119%), and home loans ($1.2B, up 137%). The company maintained its conservative outlook citing Fed rate freeze expectations and macroeconomic uncertainty, despite beating quarterly expectations.
